# TransactionBuilder&lt;TEntity&gt;.IsEntityKnown method

Indicates wether or not a *TEntity* associated with a given entity id is in memory (i.e., created or loaded).

```csharp
public bool IsEntityKnown(Guid entityId)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| entityId | The id of the entity. |

## Return Value

`true` if a *TEntity* associated with *entityId* is in memory, or else `false`.
